text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City is training hard for the Japanese Derby.
She's in great shape so far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She learns that Tamamo Cross has suffered an
injury and goes to check on her. It's painful seeing
Tamamo Cross run in her current state, but her
unrivaled ambition for victory hasn't faltered.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross knows of Gold City's success in the
Satsuki Sho and refuses to lose against her. She
remains determined to overcome any adversity
with her own two feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The determination on display emboldens Gold
City, and she strengthens her resolve to win the
upcoming Derby.
